case_title: SAMUEL ENRIQUE HERENANDEZ VS. MELVIN WASHINGTON

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERENANDEZ, SAMUEL ENRIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MELVIN AN INDIVIDUAL $3,969.79 PRINCIPAL, $79.39 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,229.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KAPPOS, STEPHEN M SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR HERENANDEZ, SAMUEL ENRIQUE

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF SAMUEL HERNANDEZ' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY, AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $340.00. MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHRIEBER, NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERENANDEZ, SAMUEL ENRIQUE

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: no appearances.

parties are deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

the court adopts its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF SAMUEL HERnandez' motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is granted. sanctions awarded in the amount of $340.00. moving party to provide proposed order.

judge pro tem mark schrieber, not reported.
